characters.name: Cassie
characters.description: Cassie is a minor tritagonist ofCrash Asks Too Many Questions. She hates Crash because he asked her several useless and annoying questions, causing her to lose her mind and subsequently lose her job. She comes to the Bernstein house and threatens Crash, but Wyatt tells her that he can get her money to get to her home country, if she leaves them alone. The technique he has in mind being winning a game show called "Crazy Family Awesome time Portland". Since she knows every thing, it seems like they're going to win, but Crash gets one wrong so that he can find out what the game show's punishment is, Which is being put on a conveyor and sent towards snakes, unless someone hits a target with a bow and arrow. Cassie manages to shoot the target, thus getting the prize money. She then goes back to her country, and leaves Crash alone. Cassie seems to be very kind woman to everyone. When she answersCrash's questions, she gets angry and tries to threaten him. She is very smart and knows all the answers to anyone's questions. When Crash's questions annoy her, she loses her mind and her job. Cassie seems to be very kind woman to everyone. When she answersCrash's questions, she gets angry and tries to threaten him. She is very smart and knows all the answers to anyone's questions. When Crash's questions annoy her, she loses her mind and her job.

characters.name: Cat Crash
characters.description: Cat Crash is an alternate personality of Crash who just happens to be a cat. Cat Crash behaves much like a normal cat would. Cat Crash's appearance is somewhat like Crash's. He is purple and wears the same shirt as Crash, but has a tail, green eyes, whiskers, a black nose, and cat ears. The hair he sheds and the hairballs he coughs up are purple. Cat Crash behaves much like a normal cat would.
characters.personality_section: Cat Crash behaves much like a normal cat would.

characters.name: Caveman Crash
characters.description: Caveman Crashis an alter ego of Crash that appears in Crashus Maximus. Caveman Crash is primitive. Caveman Crash is not very bright and gets startled by light, he gets into fights, don't get close he will bite, Caveman Crash is primitive.

characters.name: Cleo Bernstein
characters.description: Cleopatra "Cleo" Bernsteinis one of the two tritagonsts ofCrash & Bernstein. She is one of Wyatt and Crash's three sisters. She's the smart, annoying, obnoxious, and rude younger sister of Wyatt, Crash, and Amanda Bernstein. Cleo is just a year younger than Wyatt at the age of twelve and shares a room with both him and Crash, much to their dismay. Cleo claims that Crash always goes onto her side of the bedroom and before he got his own bed he slept in her doors and slept upside down on her bed handel. Also, to make Crash's new bed, Crash took some of Cleo's matress to create it. She has a fashion line named "cleo". She is portrayed by Landry Bender. Cleo thought that Crash is irritating and annoying, and he always causes her project/homework to be spoiled and erased. Cleo seems to hate Crash as much as the other sisters, however, like Amanda, she never thought of "killing" Crash to get rid of him (Amanda said she saw her "murdered" Crash although it was just a misunderstanding).

characters.description: Coach Urkhart is the coach of the wrestling team atWyatt Bernstein's school and is one ofMr. Poulos' old friends. characters.name: Crash
characters.description: Crash Bernsteinis the titular main protagonist ofCrash & Bernstein. He is a living whatnot puppet with many interesting abilities such as eating sandwiches the size of basketballs and eating a watermelon with a straw, and he comes with ninja weapons, such as ninja swords and a small cannon.

characters.name: Crashes backstory
characters.description:
crash is the main protagnist of crash and bernstein
He is a living puppet and a purple Whatnot with many interesting abilities such as eating sandwiches the size of basketballs and eating a watermelon with a straw, and he comes with ninja weapons, such as ninja swords and a small cannon. In fact, Crash was born with ninja swords in his pocket. he was born in kanto but then he got taken away and died he was revived by Wyatt bernstein Crash is a extreme, crazy, loud, and daredevilish puppet. heapparently becomes Wyatt's adoptive brother he also bathes in the toilet because he doesn't like going in public pools because of what kids do in there. he "faceslams" people that he loves, especially Wyatt as it is when crash faceslams his head into the other people's head. Crash uses himself as a basketball.Crash  can't spell, milkshakes go right through him. His eyes were the inspiration for ping pong balls, as said in a promo he has the power to turn giant and turn into mr purple and uses a beam to fight

characters.name: Crudsworth
characters.description: Crudsworth is the Crashenfest Beaver who delivers presents to all the good kids of the world. he is known to bite people. He is basically Beaver Crash but goes by the name of Crudsworth.

characters.name: Dr. Gorden
characters.description: Dr. Gordenis a minor character inCrash & Bernsteinwho appears in two episodes. In"Scaredy Crash",Crash was taken to him after his hand was bitten by a scorpion, he thought that crash was a normal person and that he had a virus that made him purple, until later finding out that he was always purple. He returns in the final episode,"Double-Header", where at the end of the episode he comes toPiehole Pizzaand tells a worker there that his medical scores aren't good, he then tellsCrashthat his medical scores are not good either and that their friendship will be a short one. Crash realizes that he is serious, it is unknown what happens next as that is the last episode of the show.

characters.name: Employee (Crash Lands)
characters.description: An unnamed Build-A-Bestie employeeis a very minor character who appears inCrash Lands. He also seems to hate his job, as when he is destroying theBuild-A-Bestiestore withWyatt Bernstein,Mr. Poulos, andCrash Bernstein, he says he will "destroy this place like it destroyed his manhood". He was portrayed by Eric Prince.

characters.name: Gerry
characters.description: Gerry Phlergeris a minor character inCrash and Bernstein. He is an annoying and rude kid who hung out withCrashandWyatt Bernsteinin the episode "Release the Crashen". He is from Barcelona. "Release the Crashen" – AfterCrashis finished with weekly bath,Wyatttells his mom that he could use some me time between his baseball, skateboarding, and playing at the arcade.Meltells Wyatt she has a better idea to book him some "helping others time". Wyatt thinks she is talking about working at the clothing drive and says no more sorting, but Mel explains that a new family moved downstairs and they have a boy around Wyatt's age, and she wants Wyatt and Crash to play with him when he comes over later. Wyatt asks her what's wrong with this one, and explains to Crash that the last kid his mom sent him off with wore a cape to school. Crash replies that can be pretty cool, and questions if it is a superhero cape or a Dracula cape. Wyatt responds a magician, and Crash shudders.

characters.name: Gladiator Crash
characters.description: Maximus wielding his blade. Gladiator Crash, or more commonly calledMaximus Octavius,was the final version of Crash thatCrashturned into. Wyatt used him to get a good grade for his report on the Roman Empire. Somehow, he returned for Crash's Crashenfest party. Maximus acts like a Roman gladiator. He tells tales of his battles, fights beasts (by beasts we mean a stuffed lion), and loves hip hop music. Holla. Maximus acts like a Roman gladiator. He tells tales of his battles, fights beasts (by beasts we mean a stuffed lion), and loves hip hop music. Holla. He has a old gladiator sword which replaces his normal ninja weapons, and cannon. he acts bravley, and loves to call Wyatt master or my leige. Hates greeks

characters.name: Great Aunt Biddy
characters.description: Great Aunt Biddy is the great aunt ofWyatt Bernstein,Amanda Bernstein,Cleo BernsteinandJasmine Bernstein. She's also the aunt ofKarl Bernstein.

characters.name: Gretchen Phlerger
characters.description: Mrs. Gretchen Phlergeris a minor character inCrash & Bernstein. She is the mother ofGerryand is very similar to her son. Like her son, Gretchen is very annoying and can sometimes be rude. She can be very sweet and is very artistic. WhenCrashknocks over some shelves of pottery, she gets very angry and yells at Mel, Crash, and Wyatt to get out which makes Gretchen and her son to stop seeing them. Like her son, Gretchen is very annoying and can sometimes be rude. She can be very sweet and is very artistic. WhenCrashknocks over some shelves of pottery, she gets very angry and yells at Mel, Crash, and Wyatt to get out which makes Gretchen and her son to stop seeing them.

characters.description: Karl Bernstein(father) Jasmine Bernsteinis a supporting character inCrash & Bernstein, She is youngest sister at the innocent age of seven. She is hardly ever seen without wearing a pink dress, and hasn't had as many appearances as her other siblings.

characters.name: Karl Bernstein
characters.description: Karl Bernsteinis a supporting character who debuts in Season 2. He is the husband of Mel and the father of Amanda, Wyatt, Cleo and Jasmine. He works as a wildlife photographer and travels a lot. He always encouraged Wyatt and is very kind.

characters.name: Lola
characters.description: Lola the Puppetwas a puppet whoCrashthought was alive and was in love with until Crash knew the truth. Crash was in love with her so much he did anything for her, including getting her free wings, and he even shared his feelings by writing "LOLA on the building but changing it to "LOL" because he was so hungry he licked off the "A". Lola withCrashat theArcade Lola was a puppet controlled by thePuppeteerand he made her sound like a tomboyish, loving and kind puppet toCrash. WhenWyatt Bernsteinuses a sock as Lola's husband( which gains sentience as it is also Wyatt's cum rag), Lola tries to tell the truth but it backfires when the Puppeteer reveals that Lola isn't alive. Crash thought lola was a loli but was quickly dissapointed Lola was a puppet controlled by thePuppeteerand he made her sound like a tomboyish, loving and kind puppet toCrash. WhenWyatt Bernsteinuses a sock as Lola's husband( which gains sentience as it is also Wyatt's cum rag), Lola tries to tell the truth but it backfires when the Puppeteer reveals that Lola isn't alive. Crash thought lola was a loli but was quickly dissapointed

characters.name: Mel Bernstein
characters.description: Mel Bernsteinis the sweet, yet sometimes bitter mother ofWyatt,Amanda,Cleo, andJasmine. She does not approve ofCrashand even threatens to destory him, and turn him into a ugly purse, but she will not because of Wyatt. She sometimes calls Wyatt, "WyGuy". She would do anything for her little "WyGuy." Mel's cartoon design from "Heroes of XD"
